title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.015 - Executions, who may have
text:
513.015.  Executions, who may have. — The party in whose favor any judgment, order or decree is rendered, may have an execution in conformity therewith.
(RSMo 1939 § 1316) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1152; 1919 § 1603; 1909 § 2172
